ROARules.GeneralRules1: Rise of Apollo is a 6-reel, 6-row video slot featuring Wilds-on-the-Way and win multiplier up to x15.

GeneralRules2.value: The game is played with 20 base bet for 64 ways - %{46656} ways, bet level of %{minBetMtp} to %{maxBetMtp} and bet size of %{minChip} to %{maxChip}.
GeneralRules2.comment: %{minBetMtp}, %{maxBetMtp}, %{minChip}, %{maxChip} will be replaced with game specific configurations.
GeneralRules2.example: The game is played with 20 base bet for 64 ways - 46,656 ways, bet level of 1 to 10 and bet size of 0.01 to 10.

ROARules.GeneralRules3: Free Spins Feature is played at the same bet size and bet level as the spin that triggered the Free Spins Feature.

ROACommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination1: After the payout of every round is made, all winning symbols will explode allowing the symbols above them to cascade down for a new round.
ROACommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination2: Additional winning combination will be tallied in every round until no more winning combination can be tallied.
ROACommonRules.SymbolPrizeExplaination3: Some symbols may occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces and each of these symbols will represent as a single symbol during payout calculations.
ROACommonRules.WildsExplaination1: Wild symbol substitutes for all symbols except Scatter symbol.
ROACommonRules.WildsExplaination2: Wild symbol appears on reels 2, 3, 4 and 5 only.

ROAWildsOnTheWay.Title: Wilds-on-the-Way
ROAWildsOnTheWay.WildsOnTheWayExplaination1: During any spin, some symbols (excluding Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) in reels 2, 3, 4 and/or 5 that occupy 2 to 4 symbols' spaces may have a silver frame around itself.
ROAWildsOnTheWay.WildsOnTheWayExplaination2: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any silver-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into a randomly selected symbol (other than Wild symbol and Scatter symbol) with a gold frame around itself.
ROAWildsOnTheWay.WildsOnTheWayExplaination3: At every new round after the new symbols have cascaded down, any gold-framed symbol(s) that is involved in a win in the previous round will be transformed into Wild symbol.

ROAMultiplier.Title: Multiplier
ROAMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination1: During any spin, all wins will be multiplied by the multiplier shown below the reels, starting with x1 in the first round.
ROAMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination2: Any win in the first round will increase the second round's multiplier to x2.
ROAMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination3: Any win in the second round will increase the third round's multiplier to x3.
ROAMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination4: Any win in the third round will increase the fourth round's multiplier to x4.
ROAMultiplier.MultiplierExplaination5: Any win in the fourth round will increase the fifth round's (and beyond) multiplier to x5.

ROAWildsBlessingFeature.Title: Wilds Blessing Feature
ROAWildsBlessingFeature.WildsBlessingFeatureExplaination1: During the start of any spin, 3 silver-framed symbols may be transformed into Wild symbols.

ROAFreeSpinRules.Title: Free Spins Feature
ROAFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination1: 4 Scatter symbols appearing anywhere will trigger the Free Spins Feature with 12 free spins. Each additional Scatter symbol will trigger 2 more free spins.
ROAFreeSpinRules.FreeSpinExplaination2: During the Free Spins Feature, the multipliers below the reels will be increased to x3, x6, x9, x12 and x15 respectively.
